bug_report.label: Bug
bug_report.aria_label: Report a bug or request a feature
bug_report.tooltip: Report a bug or request a feature

language.label: Language
language.description: Select your preferred language for the interface.
language.help_text: Translations are AI-generated. Help us improve by contributing on <0>GitHub</0>!

extension.name: Ollama Client - Chat with Local LLM Models
extension.description: Local-first Chrome extension for private LLM chat with Ollama, LM Studio, and llama.cpp, including local RAG workflows.

welcome.title: Welcome to Local LLM Chat
welcome.subtitle: Private, local-first chat with your own models

connection_failed.title: Connection Failed
connection_failed.message: Failed to connect to provider. Is the server running?

no_models.title: No Models Found
no_models.message: Install at least one chat model and one embeddings model to continue

ready.title: Ready to Chat
ready.message: Provider is connected and ready to use

setup_guide.hint: Follow the setup guide below to install Ollama and models.

performance_notice.title: Performance Notice
performance_notice.message: This extension is a user interface for your local provider (Ollama by default). Response time and model output quality depend entirely on your device's hardware (CPU, RAM, GPU) and the specific model you're using. No processing is done by the extension itself.

images.too_large: {{name}} is larger than the {{max}}MB image limit.
images.unsupported_type: {{name}} is not a supported image type. Use PNG, JPEG, or WebP.
images.heic_unsupported: HEIC isn't supported. Paste the image, or export {{name}} as JPEG or PNG.
images.model_unsupported: The selected model has no vision support. Enable it in the model menu, or pick a vision model.

input.rag_toggle_tooltip: Smart Context (Beta): Use file & chat context

session_metrics.tooltip_tokens: Total tokens used in this session

search.dialog_description: Search your chat history by meaning, not just keywords
search.no_results: No results found. Try a different search query.
search.no_results_description: Try adjusting your keywords or search scope.
search.start_typing: Start typing to search your chat history semantically...
search.start_typing_description: Search through your chat history using semantic search.

backfill.title: Backfill Chat History
backfill.description: Generate embeddings for all existing chat messages to enable semantic search
backfill.info_sessions: • This will process all messages from {{count}} {{sessions}}
backfill.info_min_chars: • Only messages with at least 10 characters will be embedded
backfill.info_time_warning: • This may take a while depending on the number of messages

voice_selector.search_placeholder: Search by name, language, or URI...
voice_selector.no_voices_available: No voices available on this device

button.tooltip: Upload file (PDF, DOCX, CSV, HTML, Text)
button.tooltip_with_images: Upload file or image (PDF, DOCX, CSV, HTML, Text, Images)

settings.max_file_size_description: Maximum allowed size for individual files. Larger files may take longer to process.
settings.max_image_size_description: Maximum allowed size for each image attached to a message for vision models.

embedding_status.error: Unable to check status. Click to retry.
embedding_status.required_for_rag: The embedding model is required for RAG features.

sheet.title: Model capabilities
sheet.subtitle: {{model}} · {{provider}}
sheet.note_manual: {{provider}} can't report this model's capabilities, so we can't detect them. Turn on what this model supports — features like image input and tools use these settings.
sheet.note_self_report: {{provider}} reports this model's capabilities automatically. Changes here override what was detected.
sheet.save_error: Couldn't save capabilities. Please try again.

toolCalling.label: Tool calling
toolCalling.desc: Can call tools/functions during a response.

embeddings.label: Embeddings
embeddings.desc: Produces embedding vectors for RAG and search.

site_overrides.title: Site-Specific Overrides
site_overrides.description: Configure custom extraction settings for specific sites using regex patterns
site_overrides.no_overrides_hint: Add patterns to customize extraction settings for specific sites

exclude_urls.title: Excluded URLs
exclude_urls.description: Block extension access from sensitive pages using regex patterns
exclude_urls.examples: Use regular expressions to match URLs. Examples: <0>^https://bank\.</0> or <0>.*\.private\..*</0>

embedding_config.database_management_description: Clean up and manage your vector embeddings database
embedding_config.remove_duplicates_description: Remove duplicate embeddings, keeping only the first occurrence of each unique message
embedding_config.clear_chat_description: Delete all chat embeddings. You can backfill later to regenerate them
embedding_config.clear_all_description: Delete all embeddings (chats, files, webpages). This action cannot be undone

database_management.remove_duplicates_confirm: Remove duplicate embeddings? This will keep only the first occurrence of each unique message.
database_management.remove_duplicates_error: Failed to remove duplicates. Check console for details.
database_management.clear_chat_confirm: Clear all chat embeddings? This will delete all semantic search data for chats. You can backfill later.
database_management.clear_chat_error: Failed to clear chat vectors. Check console for details.
database_management.clear_all_confirm: Clear ALL embeddings? This will delete all semantic search data (chats, files, webpages). This action cannot be undone.
database_management.clear_all_error: Failed to clear all vectors. Check console for details.

embedding_config.chunking_description: Configure how text is split into chunks for embedding
embedding_config.chunk_size_description: Number of tokens per chunk. Larger chunks preserve more context but may be less focused.
embedding_config.chunk_overlap_description: Overlap between chunks. Helps preserve context across chunk boundaries.
embedding_config.batch_size_description: Number of texts to embed in parallel. Higher values are faster but use more memory.
embedding_config.enable_caching_description: Cache embeddings for identical content to avoid regenerating
embedding_config.limits_description: Configure storage limits and cleanup policies
embedding_config.max_embeddings_description: Maximum embeddings per file (0 = unlimited). Helps prevent memory issues with very large files.
embedding_config.max_storage_description: Maximum storage size in MB (0 = unlimited). Oldest vectors will be deleted when limit is reached.
embedding_config.cleanup_age_description: Delete embeddings older than this many days
embedding_config.search_limit_description: Default number of results to return from semantic search
embedding_config.min_similarity_description: Minimum cosine similarity score (0-1). For semantic search, 0.4-0.6 is recommended. Higher values return more relevant but fewer results.
embedding_config.cache_ttl_description: How long to cache search results (1-60 minutes). Cached queries return instantly.
embedding_config.cache_max_size_description: Maximum number of search queries to cache (10-200). Older entries are automatically removed when limit is reached.
embedding_config.ann_backend_description: Choose the approximate nearest neighbor backend used for vector search.
embedding_config.ann_min_vectors_description: Minimum number of vectors before ANN is used (0 = always).
embedding_config.enhanced_chunking_description: Use advanced recursive character splitting for better context
embedding_config.enhanced_chunking_info: Enhanced chunking splits text hierarchically (paragraphs → sentences → words) to preserve semantic meaning. This is recommended for RAG.
embedding_config.rag_settings_description: Configure how files are used to answer questions with retrieved context
embedding_config.rag_enable_description: Use retrieved context to answer questions about your files
embedding_config.reranking_description: Use a cross-encoder model to score relevance of retrieved results. Significantly improves precision.
embedding_config.embedding_source_description: Embeddings are generated using your local provider (Ollama by default)
embedding_config.feedback_learning_description: Improve search quality by learning from your feedback
embedding_config.feedback_enable_description: Remember which chunks were helpful to improve future retrieval
embedding_config.feedback_show_chunks_description: Display source chunks in chat with feedback buttons
embedding_config.feedback_privacy_note: All feedback is stored locally. Queries are hashed for privacy. No data leaves your device.
embedding_config.feedback_clear_confirm_description: This will permanently delete all feedback. This cannot be undone.

provider_status.empty: Local provider reached, but no chat models found

selector.title: Prompt Templates
selector.description: Choose from {{count}} templates to jump start your conversation
selector.no_templates_search: Try adjusting your search or filter criteria
selector.no_templates_empty: No prompt templates are available. Create your first template in settings.

selector.title: Chat Sessions
selector.no_sessions_hint: Create your first chat to get started

toast.partial_description: Skipped {{skipped}} session(s), dropped {{droppedMessages}} message(s), {{invalidFiles}} unreadable file(s).
toast.failed_description: No readable chat sessions were found in the selected file(s).

inspector.title: Extracted Tab Context
inspector.description: Review exactly what will be used as tab context before sending.
inspector.low_reliability: Low extraction reliability. Try: switch scraper, adjust scroll depth, or use manual selection context.

chat_display.title: Chat Display
chat_display.description: Configure how chat information is displayed
chat_display.session_metrics_description: Display token usage, duration, and speed in the chat header

prompt_context_limits.title: Prompt Context Limits
prompt_context_limits.description: Control how much tab and RAG context is injected into each request.
prompt_context_limits.max_tool_result_chars_hint: Each tool result (page text, transcripts, document search) is trimmed to this many characters before the model reads it. Lower is faster on a laptop; raise it if answers miss detail.
prompt_context_limits.auto_refresh_description: When enabled, selected tabs are re-checked periodically for changes.

grounding_mode.label: Answer only from selected page context
grounding_mode.description: If relevant page context is missing, the assistant returns an insufficient-context message instead of guessing.

shortcuts.title: Keyboard Shortcuts
shortcuts.description: Customize keyboard shortcuts for quick access to features.
shortcuts.toggle_theme_desc: Switch between light and dark mode
shortcuts.toggle_speech_desc: Start or stop speaking the last AI response
shortcuts.copy_last_response_desc: Copy the last AI response to clipboard
shortcuts.toggle_session_metrics_desc: Show or hide the session metrics bar
shortcuts.export_json_desc: Export current chat as JSON file
shortcuts.export_markdown_desc: Export current chat as Markdown file
shortcuts.export_pdf_desc: Export current chat as PDF file
shortcuts.export_text_desc: Export current chat as plain text file

content_extraction.title: Content Extraction
content_extraction.description: Configure default content extraction behavior for all websites.

enable.label: Allow content extraction
enable.description: Enable enhanced content extraction with lazy loading support

selection_actions.label: Enable Selection Actions
selection_actions.description: Show local AI actions when text is selected on a page.

selection_actions_min_chars.label: Minimum selected characters
selection_actions_min_chars.description: Selections shorter than this stay hidden.

selection_actions_list.label: Selection action list
selection_actions_list.description: Choose which local text actions appear in the page toolbar.

selection_button.label: Show "Ask Local LLM" button after selection
selection_button.description: Show a floating action button when selecting text to speed up adding it to chat

auto.label: Auto
auto.detail: Good for most sites. Uses Defuddle first for improved markdown and code formatting, falls back to Readability if necessary.

defuddle.label: Defuddle
defuddle.detail: Best for GitHub, documentation, Stack Overflow, and developer blogs. Preserves code blocks and markdown structure.

readability.label: Readability
readability.detail: Suitable for news articles, Medium posts, and traditional blog content.

scroll_strategy.label: Scroll Strategy
scroll_strategy.none: Fastest extraction, lazy loading not supported
scroll_strategy.instant: Fast scrolling works well for simple lazy loading
scroll_strategy.gradual: Balanced smooth scrolling with deliberate pauses and a mix of speed and precision

scroll_depth.label: Scroll Depth
scroll_depth.description: Percentage of page to scroll (higher = more content, slower)

system.title: System Configuration
system.description: Configure system prompts and stop sequences to control model behavior.
system.prompt_placeholder: Enter a custom system prompt to guide the model's behavior...

runtime.title: Runtime & Warmup
runtime.description: Control model warmup and runtime options.
runtime.keep_alive_description: How long to keep the model loaded after a request. Use seconds or a duration like 5m.
runtime.warm_on_select_description: Preload the model when you switch to it for faster first response.
runtime.unload_on_switch_description: Free memory by unloading the last model when switching.

base_url.title: Provider Base URL
base_url.description: Configure the server endpoint for your Provider installation.
base_url.label: Provider API Server Endpoint

delete_dialog.title: Delete this model?
delete_dialog.description: This action cannot be undone. The model will be permanently removed from your local system.

model_info.title: Model Information
model_info.no_data: No data available for this model.

loaded_models.title: Loaded Models
loaded_models.no_models_title: No models currently loaded in memory
loaded_models.no_models_description: Models will appear here when loaded.

sections.conversation_description: What the assistant remembers and how chat history is indexed.
sections.prompt_budget_description: Caps on how much context is packed into each prompt.
sections.grounding_description: Restrict answers to the page you are viewing.
sections.retrieval_description: Where the assistant looks beyond the conversation — the web and your knowledge base.
sections.files_chunking_description: How uploaded files are accepted and split for retrieval.

file_upload.title: File Ingestion
file_upload.description: Configure how files are processed for knowledge retrieval.

embedding_health.title: Mixed embedding dimensions detected
embedding_health.description: Embeddings are stored at multiple dimensions ({{dimensions}}). Search and memory can fail until everything is rebuilt.
embedding_health.note: Rebuild clears all embeddings and re-embeds chat history. File uploads will need to be re-uploaded to restore knowledge.
embedding_health.memory_disabled: Memory is off, so chat embeddings were not rebuilt.
embedding_health.confirm: Rebuild embeddings? This will clear all embeddings and re-embed chat history. File uploads will need to be re-uploaded to restore knowledge.

web_search.title: Web Search
web_search.description: Let tool-capable models search the live web through a configured search provider.

enable.label: Enable web search
enable.description: Expose a web_search tool to supported models when the provider config is valid.

provider.label: Provider
provider.description: Choose the backend used behind the single web_search tool.

endpoint.label: SearXNG endpoint
endpoint.description: Base URL for your self-hosted SearXNG instance.

api_key.label: API key
api_key.description: Stored locally on this device and masked in the UI.

safe_search.label: Safe search
safe_search.description: Provider safety filter for search results.

result_count.label: Result count
result_count.description: Maximum results returned to the model.

web_search.beta_tooltip: Beta. If you run into issues, please report them.

base_url.label: API base URL
base_url.description: Shown for transparency. This endpoint is fixed by the selected provider.

searxng_pages.label: SearXNG pages
searxng_pages.description: Search result pages to fetch from SearXNG before applying the result count cap.

memory.title: Contextual Memory
memory.description: Allow the AI to remember details from past conversations to provide personalized responses.

enable.label: Enable Memory
enable.description: When enabled, chat history is stored locally and used to provide context.

clear.label: Clear Memory
clear.confirm_dialog: Are you sure you want to clear all chat memory? This cannot be undone.

page.title: Ollama Client Settings
page.description: Manage all aspects of your Ollama setup in one place. For tips and setup guidance, visit the Guides tab.

presets.title: Presets
presets.description: Apply a tuned combination in one click. You can still adjust any individual setting afterward.

fast.label: Fast
fast.description: Smaller context and retrieval for quicker, lighter responses.

balanced.label: Balanced
balanced.description: The recommended defaults — a good middle ground.

large_context.label: Large context
large_context.description: Bigger context and retrieval for thorough answers on capable machines.

privacy_strict.label: Privacy strict
privacy_strict.description: No page access, answers grounded to the open page, no auto-embedding, web search off.

reset_section.title: Reset this section to defaults?
reset_section.description: This restores the controls in this section to their default values. Other settings are untouched.

speech.title: Speech Settings
speech.description: Configure your text-to-speech voice, speed, and tone settings.
speech.test_text_placeholder: Test your voice settings by typing here...
speech.test_hint_text: Click "Test Voice" to hear your text.
speech.test_hint_default: Click "Test Voice" to hear the default sample.
speech.test_fallback: Hello, this is a test of your speech settings.

embeddings.title: Vector Embeddings
embeddings.description: Embeddings enable semantic search, retrieval augmented generation, and context-aware features for file uploads and chat history.

test_generation.title: Test Embedding Generation
test_generation.description: Generate a test embedding to verify the embedding model is working correctly.

rebuild_index.title: Rebuild Keyword Index
rebuild_index.description: Force a rebuild of the keyword search index from existing vectors. Use this if search results are missing or inconsistent.
rebuild_index.error: Failed to rebuild index. Please try again.

test_search.title: Semantic Search
test_search.description: Verify your uploaded files are accessible and searchable. Enter a search query to find matching content.
test_search.no_results: No results found. Try a different search or upload more content.

what_are_embeddings.title: What are Embeddings?
what_are_embeddings.point_1: Convert text into numerical vectors that capture semantic meaning
what_are_embeddings.point_2: Enable semantic search across your chat history and uploaded files
what_are_embeddings.point_4: Provide relevant context from your files to improve AI responses

model_select.label: Embedding Model
model_select.description: Choose a model to generate embeddings. You may need to download it first.
model_select.show_advanced_description: Enable advanced selection for any embedding model exposed by your providers. Recommended models give the most consistent search quality.

model_change_confirm.title: Rebuild embeddings now?
model_change_confirm.description: Changing embedding models can make existing vectors incompatible. Rebuild the index to keep search results accurate, or switch without rebuilding.

prompts.title: Prompt Templates
prompts.description: Manage your collection of {{count}} prompt templates.

reset_dialog.title: Reset templates to defaults?
reset_dialog.description: This will replace all of your current templates with the default ones. This action cannot be undone.

form.title: Title
form.description_placeholder: A brief description of the template's purpose and functionality.

delete_dialog.title: Delete template
delete_dialog.description: Are you sure you want to delete "{{title}}"? This action cannot be undone.

empty_state.title: No templates found
empty_state.description: Try adjusting your search or filter criteria

reset.title: Reset Settings
reset.description: Clear stored data by module or reset everything to defaults

danger_zone.title: Danger Zone
danger_zone.description: This will clear all data and cannot be undone

dialog.title: Confirm Reset
dialog.description: This will clear all data and cannot be undone.

feedback.title: User Feedback
feedback.description: Clear all learning and retrieved chunk feedback

providers.beta_notice: This provider is in beta. If you face any issue, please report it or open an issue on the repo.
providers.custom_models_description: Add models manually if they don't appear in the auto-discovered list.

test_connection.success_description: Successfully connected to {{name}} at {{url}}. Found {{count}} model(s).
test_connection.no_models_description: Reached {{url}}, but no models were returned. Make sure the provider is running, the base URL is correct, and at least one model is installed or loaded.
test_connection.inline_no_models: Reached {{url}}, but no models were returned. Check that the provider is running and has models installed or loaded.
test_connection.api_key_required: Add an API key for {{name}} before testing the connection.

migration.title: Data Migration
migration.description: Export or import all your extension data including preferences, chat history, and embedding databases.

export.label: Export Full Backup
export.description: Download a complete backup of all extension data as a ZIP file.

import.label: Import Backup
import.description: Restore data from a previously exported ZIP backup. This will overwrite existing data.

import_confirm.title: Are you absolutely sure?
import_confirm.description: This action will completely overwrite your existing preferences, chat history, and databases with the contents of the backup file. This action cannot be undone.

import_result.title: Import Results
import_result.description: Review the status of your data import below:

guides.title: Helpful Guides & Documentation
guides.description: Need help setting up Ollama Client or exploring features? Check out these useful resources

support.title: Support the Project
support.description: Help us grow by featuring Ollama Client on Product Hunt
support.image_alt: Ollama Client - Chat with local LLMs — right inside your browser | Product Hunt

library.label: Official Ollama Model Library
library.description: Browse available AI models and documentation

github.label: GitHub Repo
github.description: Source code, releases, and contribution guidelines

errorBoundary.title: Something went wrong
errorBoundary.description: An unexpected error occurred. We've logged this issue internally.

knowledge_sets.title: Knowledge Sets
knowledge_sets.active_description: Select which knowledge set to use when no files are attached.
knowledge_sets.create_description: Create a new knowledge set for grouping files.
knowledge_sets.rename_description: Change the name of the active knowledge set.
knowledge_sets.delete_description: Delete the active knowledge set and its file mapping (embeddings remain).
knowledge_sets.prompt_description: Instructions that will be injected before retrieved context for this knowledge set.
knowledge_sets.question_prompt_description: Prompt used to rewrite follow-up questions into standalone queries for this knowledge set.
knowledge_sets.topk_description: How many chunks to retrieve for this knowledge set.
knowledge_sets.min_similarity_description: Minimum similarity threshold for chunks in this knowledge set.
knowledge_sets.min_rerank_description: Minimum reranker confidence for chunks in this knowledge set.

embedding_source.provider_details: High quality embeddings • 768-1024 dimensions • Consistent results
embedding_source.webgpu_warning_text: due to Chrome Extension Content Security Policy constraints. WebGPU re-ranking is still active and working. Embeddings are generated via the provider fallback chain, using the default provider when native support is unavailable.
embedding_source.performance_default: Default provider embedding generation: ~500ms per chunk
embedding_source.provider_hint: Ensure your local provider is running (default: localhost:11434)
